render_evidence.basis: hand-stamp: live render + structural parity + human review (original generic-template stamp; no numeric structural-parity score was retained for this legacy stamp)
render_evidence.lane: generic-template live-verify 2026-07-04 (original four: kpi / part-to-whole / ranking / time-series)
render_evidence.critical_pass: not recorded (legacy hand-stamp; earned by human review, pass-list ratio not retained)
render_evidence.high_pass: not recorded (legacy hand-stamp; earned by human review, pass-list ratio not retained)
render_evidence.pixel_oracle: none (generic template has no golden anchor; an anchor-only comparison is circular and is not credited)

description: A single big-number text card: one measure aggregated and shown as label text.
avoid_when: The ask is for a grand total, a subtotal, or a running / cumulative 'percent of total' — a subtotaling or windowed running-sum aggregation across the rows of a table, not a single big-number KPI value.

slots.notes: template field is the generic name 'Value'; binds a single quantitative measure. Portability is 'across the committed fixture classes + render-verified' (see portability_evidence), not a blanket 'any dataset'.
